summary: Comprehensive CRM system testing completed successfully. All backend APIs (18/18) passed. Frontend navigation, KPI dashboard, customer management, purchase tracking, and call logging working correctly. Minor React rendering warning detected but functionality not affected.

design_issues.issue: React runtime warning: 'Objects are not valid as a React child' error visible in error overlay
Missing Description or aria-describedby warning for DialogContent components

passed_tests: CRM Dashboard KPI display (8 cards with correct data)
Customer listing with pagination and search
Customer creation with mobile as unique ID
Customer profile page with full data (medicine calendar, timeline, tasks)
Medicine purchase addition with auto next_due_date calculation
RC customer auto-classification after 3 purchases of same medicine
Refill due management with category filters (all/overdue/today/3days/7days)
CRM call logging with results and remarks
Customer search by medicine and mobile number
Frontend navigation between CRM and Refill Due pages
KPI cards displaying correct metrics (Total: 3, RC: 1, Due Today: 0, etc.)
Customer profile navigation and data display
Filter buttons functionality on Refill Due page
Search functionality on both CRM and Refill Due pages
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix React rendering warning in Customer Profile page - likely an object being passed where string/number expected. Add aria-describedby attributes to Dialog components for accessibility compliance.
